title: 22mm x 15mm x 22mm Compression Reducing Tee (Known as Compression tee / 22mm Compression tee/reducing tee Also Available in 8mm, 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 22mm, 28mm, 35mm, 42mm, 54mm)
features: This listing is for a Pack of 1
Please note that a reducing tee is measured as follows with the tee facing up: 1st stated measurement is Left, 2nd stated measurement is right, 3rd stated measurement is facing up
Brass fittings are relatively easy to install, requiring simple tools such as wrenches or pipe wrenches for tightening, reducing installation time and labor costs.
Brass is inherently resistant to corrosion, making brass fittings ideal for use in plumbing systems exposed to moisture, chemicals, or harsh environments.
